description: Color photograph, vertical, of a very large American flag (Stars and Stripes) hung vertically down the facade of a tan/beige stone government office building. The flag drapes from the roofline (where two floodlights or light fixtures are visible against an overcast white-gray sky) down across several stories of the building, partly covering rows of dark recessed windows. The flag's blue star canton is at upper left and the red-and-white stripes hang in soft vertical folds. There is no added graphic design, overlaid text, typography, or agency logo on the image itself. There is no real on-image lettering. The tweet caption reads 'God Bless America.'
notable_text: (no on-image text; tweet caption: "God Bless America")
